task: Search for a red Toyota Corolla from model years 2018 to 2023 on CarMax.
final_result_response:
The search has been successfully completed on CarMax. All the requested filters are applied:

- **Make**: Toyota
- **Model**: Corolla
- **Exterior Color**: Red
- **Year**: 2018-2023

The page shows **"Used Red Toyota Corolla near me for sale"** with **70 matches** found. The filter tags visible at the top confirm: **Toyota**, **Corolla**, **Red Ext.**, and **2018-2023**.

The results display red Toyota Corollas from the specified year range, such as:
1. 2021 Toyota Corolla LE – $19,998 – 40K mi
2. 2023 Toyota Corolla LE – $20,998 – 31K mi
3. 2022 Toyota Corolla LE – $20,998 – 21K mi

The task is complete. The search for a red Toyota Corolla from model years 2018 to 2023 has been successfully performed on CarMax.com with all filters properly applied.
thoughts: I can see the CarMax homepage. Let me first dismiss the cookie banner, then search for Toyota Corolla.

Cookie banner is dismissed. Now let me click on the search box and type "Toyota Corolla".
Cookie banner is dismissed. Now let me click on the search box and type "Toyota Corolla".

I still see Corolla iM and GR Corolla filters. Let me click the X on "Corolla iM" more precisely.

Now I can see the filters show only "Toyota" and "Corolla" with 1,990 matches. The heading says "Used Toyota Corolla near me for sale". Now I need to apply the Year filter (2018-2023) and the Color filter (Red). Let me scroll down to find the Year filter in the sidebar.
I can see the Year filter has expanded with "From" (currently 2014) and "To" (currently 2026) dropdowns. I need to change "From" to 2018 and "To" to 2023. Let me click on the "From" dropdown first.
I can see the select picker opened with year options. I need to select 2018 (index 8) for the "From" year.
The "From" year is now set to 2018 and I can see the "2018 and Newer" filter tag. Now I need to change the "To" dropdown from 2026 to 2023. Let me click on the "To" dropdown.
The "To" dropdown is open. I need to select 2023, which is at index 3.

The year range is now set to 2018-2023, showing 861 matches. I can see the filter tag "2018-2023" is applied. Now I need to go back to all filters and apply the color filter for "Red". Let me click "Back to all filters" first.

I'm back to the all filters view. I can see the filter sidebar with options like Sort by, Distance or Shipping, Price, Make & Model, Trim, Packages, Body Type, Year. I need to scroll down to find the Color filter. Let me scroll down in the sidebar.
I can now see "Exterior Color" at the bottom of the sidebar. Let me click on it to expand the color filter options.
I can see the Exterior Color filter options are now showing. I can see "Red (69)" in the list. Let me click on it to select the Red color filter.

The search is now complete with all the filters applied. I can see:

- **Heading**: "Used Red Toyota Corolla near me for sale"
- **Filters applied**: Toyota, Corolla, Red Ext., 2018-2023

- The results show red Toyota Corollas from 2018-2023 model years, including:

  - 2023 Toyota Corolla LE - $20,998 - 31K mi
  - 2022 Toyota Corolla LE - $20,998 - 21K mi
